repo_prior_art.cite: parent pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded/v1 has ratio-indexed one-cutoff LP route, not fixed-(j,lambda,m) extendable flow lift

published_prior_art.cite: rosenman_rajkumar_gauriot_slonim_2019_discrete_manipulation: sequential convex programming for discrete manipulated RD, not laminar transportation/TU certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: parent pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded/v1 is one-cutoff; doc/API.md has no many-neighborhood manipulated-RD PartialID computation entry

published_prior_art.cite: gerard_rokkanen_rothe_2020_rdbounds gives one-cutoff sharp manipulation bounds; bertanha_2020_many_thresholds and cattaneo_keele_titiunik_vazquezbare_2021_multicutoff are multi-cutoff point-ID/extrapolation, not manipulation PI flow computation

repo_prior_art.cite: parent pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded/v1 lacks an explicit dual audit certificate

published_prior_art.cite: orlin_1993_mincostflow supplies standard min-cost-flow machinery; causal/RD slice-audit use is new but duality itself is standard

novelty_flags.label: upgrade
novelty_flags.one_line: PN2 computation delta is only partial: the draft adds the promised mass-profile/flow objects, but the worked computation in Exhibit 9.1 has an endpoint error, so the explicit boundary-case computation is not yet delivered cleanly.

soundness_flags.label: Exhibit 9.1
soundness_flags.one_line: For neighborhood 2 the table gives theta_2(m_2)=0.30/m_2 over m_2 in {0.70,...,1.00}, so B_{2,U}=3/7 and B_{2,L}=3/10, not B_{2,L}=B_{2,U}=3/7.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The fixed-slice dual certificate is named as (alpha,beta,gamma,delta), but the proposal never states the dual constraints/sign conventions or a precise parent certificate object for the J=1 equality.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The computation upgrade is substantively present, but the explicit Exhibit 9.1 endpoint/certificate audit is not internally consistent yet.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Repair Exhibit 9.1 by reporting both coordinate endpoints for neighborhood 2, then recompute the lower-endpoint sign-reversed slice table.
Add the actual fixed-slice primal and dual LP pair with sign conventions, reduced-cost inequalities, and a verified dual objective value for the worked instance.
State the finite ratio set Lambda_j constructively, not only by cardinality O(M_j^2), so the flagship algorithm has an auditable input-output specification.

recommended_next_step: Patch the Exhibit 9.1 endpoint arithmetic and make Conjecture 2's dual certificate mathematically explicit before resubmitting.
